⬡ POLYGONE
Install Protocol Compare Specs GitHub
Post-Quantum · Zero Metadata · Open Source

POLYGONE

"Information does not exist. It drifts."

Compared to the Alternatives

Every solution hides something. POLYGONE hides the existence of communication itself.

VPN Tor ⬡ POLYGONE
Hides content ✓ ✓ ✓
Hides source IP ✓ ✓ ✓
Hides target IP ✗ ✓ ✓
Post-quantum crypto ✗ ✗ ✓
No persistent relay ✗ ✗ ✓
Messages auto-evaporate ✗ ✗ ✓
Provable zero-log ✗ ~ ✓
Open source ~ ✓ ✓
The core insight: classical privacy tools hide what you say. POLYGONE hides that you said anything at all.
~ = depends on implementation
$ polygone self-test█

Install in 30 seconds

curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lvs0/Polygone/main/install.sh | bash

Why It Matters in 2026

⚠️

Quantum Threat is Real

NIST finalized ML-KEM in 2024. RSA and ECC are already obsolete — they just don't know it yet. POLYGONE is post-quantum from day one.

📊

Metadata is Damaging

Who you call matters more than what you say. A single metadata leak can destroy careers, relationships, and lives. POLYGONE doesn't leak metadata.

🌍

Authoritarians Are Watching

Encrypted apps get blocked. VPNs get banned. POLYGONE's protocol is invisible — there's no server to block, no protocol signature to detect.

🔧

Surveillance is Infrastructure

Most "private" apps phone home. POLYGONE has zero telemetry, zero analytics, zero phone home. MIT licensed.

The Protocol

Classical encryption hides content. POLYGONE hides that a communication even existed.

STEP 01

ML-KEM-1024

Post-quantum key exchange. Resists quantum cryptanalysis.

⬡
STEP 02

AES-256-GCM

Encrypt payload with unique session nonce.

⬡
STEP 03

Shamir 4-of-7

Fragment into 7 shares. 4 needed to reconstruct.

⬡
STEP 04

BLAKE3 DHT

Route through random 7-node topology. 30s TTL.

⬡
STEP 05

Vaporize

Message evaporates. No trace. No metadata.

"Traditional encryption protects content. But an observer can always see that a communication happened. Tor hides IPs. Signal encrypts messages. But nothing hides the existence of the communication itself. POLYGONE changes the question — not 'how to hide what circulates' but 'how to make it seem like nothing circulates at all.'"

Cryptographic Specifications

Pure Rust. Zero unsafe code. Memory-safe by default.

🔐

ML-KEM-1024

NIST FIPS 203 standard. Post-quantum key encapsulation. 34µs encapsulation. Resists Shor's algorithm.

📝

ML-DSA-87

NIST FIPS 204 standard. Post-quantum signatures. Authenticate nodes and packets.

🔒

AES-256-GCM

Military-grade encryption. 96-bit random nonce per session. Auth tag guarantees integrity.

🌊

Shamir 4-of-7 SSS

Information-theoretic security. k-1 fragments reveal zero information. Classical secret sharing.

⏱️

30s TTL + Auto-Vaporize

Messages auto-expire. Fragments deleted. No forensic trail. ephemeral by design.

🛡️

Forward Secrecy

Unique keys per session. Compromised past keys don't threaten future communications.

34µs
ML-KEM ENCAPSULATION
3.8µs
AES-256-GCM
208µs
FULL E2E SEND
0
METADATA LEAKED

Built Different

No VPN. No Tor. No "encrypted tunnel". POLYGONE is a completely different architecture.

🌐

No Tunnel

No encrypted pipe between A and B. Message becomes distributed computational state across the DHT.

📡

No Observability

An observer cannot prove a message existed. No source IP, no target IP, no timing correlation.

💨

No Persistence

30-second TTL. Messages evaporate. Data never sits on disk. ephemeral by default.

🔬

Post-Quantum

ML-KEM-1024 + ML-DSA-87. Ready for quantum computers that break RSA/ECC today.

⬡ POLYGONE · By Lévy, 14 years old, France
